description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.
Turns weapon into a "Smartgun". Refer to all rules specified on pg. 344 before using.
Plating on your hand which allows you to utilise Smartguns. Requires a neural link.
Provides immunity to inhalable gases or fumes.
An Exotic Shotgun that uses the Heavy Weapons Skill. Refer to the full item description on pg. 348.

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-4 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are reduced/improved by 1 for each BODY point the wearer has above 6 (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab).. Does not ablate while at or above 13 SP unless damage exceeds SP, the blow is from a melee weapon, or AP ammo is used.
Increase Body by 2 (and related stats). Stacks. Max at 10 Body.
If damage dealt to target they are set alight. Target takes 2 damage to HP at end of their turn unless they use action to extinguish flames. Does not stack.
If damage dealt to target they are set alight. Target takes 2 damage to HP at end of their turn unless they use action to extinguish flames. Does not stack.

A basic lob or pitch of an object. Use an Action to make a Ranged Attack at up to 25m/yds. Targets can choose to Dodge your throw if they can Dodge bullets. Melee weapons deal their base damage, but don't penetrate half SP.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 5x/Special Boss Threat - Eviction specialists usually work alone, though sometimes small teams are dispatched when an "infestation" is particularly troublestome.

Corp-Wide Ability - Scott Brown Motherfucker, Get The Fuck Out, I've Got A Showing!: When a Scott Brown agent enters the scene, they can choose to exclaim this line. If they were not previously known, they are placed at the top of the initiative order regardless of roll, and immediately open fire. Any actors in the scene with a rep of 2 or less must succeed a DV15 Cool Endurance check (use lowdown for NPCs). On failure, any NPCs attempt to flee, while player characters are immediately suppressed with the agent(s) in the scene acting as the source of the effect. They remain suppressed until passing the check, which they can attempt to do at the start of each of their turns.

Ability - Property Values: An eviction specialist's incendiary weapons do not damage terrain, using a complex chemical mixture which comes out as a bright green, sticky, noxious cloud but which does not ignite and can be safely scrubbed or vacuumed after it settles. Additionally, while in a scene where the eviction specialist has knowledge of the property, the eviction specialist's apparatus and grenade radius are extended by an additional 2m/yds in all directions.

There are two types of evictions in Night City. One involves teargas and the NCPD. That'll be when you were a paying tenant at one point. And the other is when you're squatting and they just want the problem taken care of. Mind the fumes.
